articles.author: Jessica Davies
articles.title: WTF is SPUR’s publisher-run Content Telemetry Framework?
articles.description: SPUR is publisher‑run and fixated on one thing: turning AI’s use of their content from opaque scraping into a transparent, usage‑based licensing system they control.
articles.content: After years of watching AI products treat their journalism as a free buffet, publishers have formed a coalition to create a new standard that tracks how AI systems access their content at every step.… [+7301 chars]
